sections.paragraph:
- Original: μεγαλειότης

- Transliteration: megaleiotes

- Phonetic: meg-al-i-ot'-ace

- Definition:

1. greatness, magnificence

a. of the majesty of God

b. of the visible splendour of the divine majesty as it appeared in the transfiguration of Christ

- Origin: from G3167

- TDNT entry: 13:01,6

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G3167; superbness that is glory or splendor: - magnificence majesty mighty power.
